text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
The time has come! Among the abundant shrines
and temples of Kyoto, we face the grand trial for
the Kikuka crown!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
We worked so hard to get here, I can almost see
my life passing before my eyes...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
choice_data_list: I don't think it's your time to go just yet...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Gasp! You're right! This is still only the beginning!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
The Kikuka Sho is a fiendishly long 3,000 meters.
I've never raced such a distance before...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
But with all this luck I've scraped together, I'm
sure we'll make it through somehow!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Go forth, my little lucky charms! Crush my
competition! And maybe level off the dreaded
Yodo Hill while you're at it!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: I'll just sit back and see how it goes...
choice_data_list: You better put in some effort too!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, yeah, I know! I'm doing my part. I drank my
lucky milk today to keep my energy up.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
If we get through this, no one will be able to
stand against my faith. O gods, let them see the
power of unparalleled luck!
